title: chore(deps): update dependency webdriverio to v5.4.13
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| webdriverio | devDependencies | patch | `5.4.7` -> `5.4.13` | [homepage](https://webdriver.io), [source](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio) |

---

### [`v5.4.13`](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​5413-2019-02-02)

##### :rocket: New Feature

-   `wdio-cli`, `wdio-config`
    -   [#​3468](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3468) Add automatically determination of the RDC hostname for US/EU ([@​wswebcreation](https://togithub.com/wswebcreation))

##### :bug: Bug Fix

-   `webdriver`
    -   [#​3487](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3487) Fixing element not found for iPhone ([@​abjerstedt](https://togithub.com/abjerstedt))
